action: During cycles 339-341 the ship phase logged: `[contract-gate] ship: ambiguity, failing open: deliverable: no contract registered for phase "ship"`. EVOLVE_CONTRACT_GATE is enforce by default, but the ship phase has no deliverable contract registered, so the gate fails OPEN for ship on every cycle. Every other spine phase (scout/build/audit) has a contract. FIX: register a deliverable contract for the ship phase in the phasecontract SSOT (e.g. require a pushed commit SHA + ship-report.md / ledger ship entry) so the contract gate can enforce rather than silently fail open. Low risk, closes a gate hole.
evidence_pointer: .evolve/loop-resume-r3-20260614.log (contract-gate ship fail-open line, cycles 339-341); go/internal/phases contract registry
